acceptance.reason: Phase 25 internal outcome-telemetry runtime and canonical Layer D reporting are regression-covered on the deterministic gate path; provider-backed live-memory behavioral closure remains outside this gate.

commands.label: phase-25-targeted-regressions
stderrTail: (pass) rules-only reviewer > does not merge tool outcome experiences that only share the action name [0.16ms]
(pass) rules-only reviewer > renders full action labels when outcome-derived guidance reuses the same command name [0.18ms]
(pass) behavioral telemetry > normalizes tool outcome telemetry into an internal experience record [0.07ms]
(pass) behavioral telemetry > attaches internal compiled guidance without changing the public proposal shape [0.04ms]
(pass) behavioral adaptation eval > validates fixtures and rejects malformed paired priming cases [0.10ms]
(pass) behavioral adaptation eval > loads fixtures and produces canonical layer_d metrics with split profiles [12.39ms]
(pass) behavioral adaptation eval > does not accept an unrelated warning for conditioning first-action scoring [2.78ms]
(pass) outcome telemetry promotion chain > promotes repeated tool outcome failures into a validated pattern without explicit feedback memory [1.21ms]
(pass) outcome telemetry promotion chain > does not persist dangling evidence lineage when evidence storage fails [0.30ms]

inScope: canonical layer_d behavioral adaptation report contract
phase-25 deterministic fallback eval and gate
outOfScope: public API or public config widening
making priming a blocking release metric
